name: aerofyta
description: AeroFyta — Autonomous multi-chain payment agent with 4-agent orchestrator, 8-stage transaction pipeline, 12 Tether WDK packages, 9 blockchains

scripts.postinstall: cd agent && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.install:all: cd agent && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n agent,dashboard -c green,blue "cd agent && npm run dev" "cd dashboard && npm run dev"
scripts.build:all: cd agent && npm run build && cd ../dashboard && npm run build
scripts.test:all: cd agent && npm test && cd ../contracts && npx hardhat test
